welcome.title: Barka da zuwa AjoLedger
welcome.body: Muna sabunta ajiyar al'umma da gaskiya, amana, da sauƙi, tare da kiyaye al'adun Ajo da kuka saba da ita.

recorded.title: Kowace Biyan Kuɗi. Ana Rubuta Ta Atomatik.
recorded.body: Babu ƙarin takardun lissafi ko rasit. Ana bin diddigin kowace biyan kuɗi ta atomatik, don ku ga ajiyarku a kowane lokaci.

confidence.title: Bi Ajiyarku da Kwarin Gwiwa.
confidence.body: San matsayin biyan kuɗinku, biyan kuɗin da ke zuwa, da ci gaban ajiyarku a cikin dashboard mai sauƙi da aka tsara ga kowa.

auth.createAccessPasscodeTitle: Ƙirƙiri lambar shiga ta app mai lamba 6
auth.createAccessPasscodeSubtitle: Za ka yi amfani da wannan lambar shiga don buɗe app.
auth.enterPasscodePlaceholder: Shigar da lambar shiga mai lamba 6
auth.enterAccessPasscodeSubtitle: Shigar da lambar shiga mai lamba 6 don ci gaba.
auth.forgetPasscodeBody: A ga fitar da ku kuma dole ne ku shiga da imel da kalmar sirri don saita sabuwar lambar shiga.
auth.enterPinSubtitle: Shigar da PIN mai lamba 4 don ci gaba.
auth.createPinSubtitle: Za ka yi amfani da wannan PIN don muhimman ayyuka.
auth.socialComingSoonTitle: Yana zuwa nan ba da jimawa ba
auth.socialComingSoonBody: Shiga ta Google da Apple za su kasance idan backend ya shirya.

errors.invalidEmail: Imel ba daidai ba ne. Sake gwadawa.
errors.weakPassword: Kalmar sirri dole ta kasance aƙalla haruffa 8. Sake gwadawa.
errors.accessPasscodeLength: Lambar shiga dole ta kasance lambobi 6.
errors.accessPasscodeMismatch: Lambobin shiga ba su dace ba. Sake gwadawa.
errors.incorrectAccessPasscode: Lambar shiga ba daidai ba ce. Sake gwadawa.
errors.passcodeLockedOut: Yunƙurin da yawa. Sake gwadawa cikin {{seconds}} daƙiƙa.
errors.pinMismatch: PINs ba su dace ba. Sake gwadawa.
errors.generic: Wani abu ya faru. Sake gwadawa.

home.overviewSubtitle: Ga nan ne bayanin ajiyar ku
home.dueInDaysDash: Za a yi biya cikin kwanaki {{count}} - {{date}}
home.totalDueThisWeek: Jimillar da za a biya wannan mako:
home.totalDueSubtitle: Jimillar biyan da ake buƙata a duk ƙungiyoyi masu aiki

errors.generic: Wani abu ya faru. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.

home.comingSoonTitle: Yana zuwa nan ba da jimawa ba
home.comingSoonBody: Wannan allo zai kasance a sabuntawa mai zuwa.

contributionReminder.title: Tunatarwar biyan kuɗi
contributionReminder.subtitle: Biyan kuɗin ku na gaba zai yi mako mai zuwa

upcomingPayout.title: Biyan Kuɗi Mai Zuwa
upcomingPayout.subtitle: {{name}} zai karɓi biyan kuɗi na gaba

bankDetails.title: Shigar da bayanan asusun ku
bankDetails.subtitle: Wannan asusun ne za ku karɓa biyan kuɗin ajiyar ku
bankDetails.profileHint: Sabunta bayanan banki daga saituna zai buƙaci PIN na ciniki (yana zuwa nan ba da jimawa ba).

errors.bankRequired: Da fatan za a zaɓi banki.
errors.accountInvalid: Shigar da lambar asusu mai inganci mai lamba 10.
errors.resolveRequired: Tabbatar da asusun ku kafin ci gaba.
errors.resolveFailed: Ba a iya tabbatar da bayanan asusu ba. Sake gwadawa.
errors.banksLoadFailed: Ba a iya lodawa bankuna ba. Sake gwadawa.
errors.banksUnavailable: Jerin bankuna bai samu ba tukuna. Sake gwadawa.

bankDetailsSuccess.title: Sabunta Asusu
bankDetailsSuccess.message: An ajiye asusun ku cikin nasara

firstTime.heroMessage: Ƙirƙiri ko shiga ƙungiyar ajiya don fara ajiya tare da al'ummarka
firstTime.whySaveTitle: Me yasa ajiya tare da AjoLedger?

secure.title: Amintacce & Bayyananne
secure.body: An rubuta kowane biyan kuɗi kuma yana da aminci

informed.title: Kasance da Labari
informed.body: Samu tunatarwa da sabuntawa a kowane lokaci

join.title: Shiga Ƙungiya
join.subtitle: Shiga ajiya mai wanzuwa da lambar gayyata

help.title: Kuna Bukatar Taimako?
help.subtitle: Muna nan don taimaka muku a kowane mataki

bankRequired.title: Ƙara bankin biyan kuɗi da farko
bankRequired.body: Kuna buƙatar asusun banki inda za ku karɓa biyan Ajo kafin shiga ko ƙirƙirar ƙungiya.

empty.headline: Cim ma burin cikin sauri, tare.
empty.message: Shiga ƙungiyar ajiya ta gayyata ko fara Ajo naka tare da mutane da ka amince da su

join.title: Shiga Ƙungiya (da gayyata)
join.subtitle: (Yana buƙatar lambar gayyata ko hanyar haɗi)

errors.nameLength: Sunan ƙungiya dole ya kasance tsakanin haruffa 3 da 100.
errors.descriptionLength: Bayani dole ya kasance haruffa 500 ko ƙasa da haka.

list.heading: Ƙungiyoyinku
list.memberBadge: Kun shiga wannan ƙungiyar a matsayin memba

payoutOrder.title: Tsarin Biyan
payoutOrder.assignBody: Taɓa membobi ɗaya bayan ɗaya don saita tsarin da za su karɓi biyan su.
payoutOrder.incompleteBody: Taɓa kowane memba don saita juyin biyan su kafin farawa.
payoutOrder.adminOnlyBody: Mahaliccin ƙungiyar kawai zai iya saita tsarin biyan.
payoutOrder.successBody: An adana juyoyi kuma an fara zagayen gudummawa.
payoutOrder.memberUnassignedA11y: {{name}}, ba a sanya ba. Taɓa don saita na gaba.

errors.title: An kasa farawa
errors.generic: Wani abu ya faru. Sake gwadawa.

join.title: Shigar da Lamba
join.subtitle: Shigar da lambar gayyatar da mai gudanar da ƙungiyar ya raba

errors.invalid: Shigar da lamba mai inganci kamar AJO-7JM200.

detail.title: Ƙungiya
detail.payoutPending: Ba a sanya lambar biyan kuɗi ba tukuna.
detail.accountPending: Ana shirya asusun ƙungiyar ku. Duba daga baya.

ledger.title: Daftari
ledger.payoutComingSoon: Za a samu biyan wannan a sabuntawa na gaba.

biometrics.enablePrompt: Tabbatar don kunna buɗewa da biometrics
biometrics.notAvailableBody: Wannan na'ura ba ta goyi bayan yatsa ko Face ID.
biometrics.notEnrolledBody: Ƙara yatsa ko Face ID a cikin saitunan na'urar ku, sannan ku sake gwadawa.

errors.invalidEmail: Imel ba daidai ba ne. Sake gwadawa.
errors.invalidPhone: Shigar da ingantacciyar lambar waya ta Najeriya mai lamba 11.

editPhoto.title: Gyara Hoton Bayani
editPhoto.permissionBody: Ka ba da izinin kamara ko ɗakin hotuna don sabunta hoton bayaninka.
editPhoto.webUnavailable: Daukar hoto ba ya samuwa a yanar gizo a wannan demo.
editPhoto.updateFailed: Ba a iya sabunta hoton bayaninka ba. Sake gwadawa.
